seoTitle: Three Bridges vs Timboon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Three Bridges and Timboon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Three Bridges vs Timboon: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Three Bridges and Timboon.
heading: Three Bridges vs Timboon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Three Bridges, Victoria and Timboon, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Three Bridges has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Timboon (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Three Bridges or Timboon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Three Bridges has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Timboon scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Three Bridges scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Timboon scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Three Bridges or Timboon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Three Bridges has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
